data.name: Hentai Furry Pig
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Furry Pig — A Spicy Puzzle Game for Adults (18+)

Hentai Furry Pig is a puzzle game filled with speed, thrill, and temptation. You’ll meet a bold biker girl who loves adrenaline, roaring engines, and male attention. Clear stages and unlock new explicit illustrations as rewards for your progress.

🔹 Game Features:

  • 2 mini-games in every level:

    • Memory game — flip tiles and match identical pairs.

    • Picture puzzle — after the first mini-game, assemble the heroine’s image.

  • After completing both parts, the full illustration is revealed.

  • Plenty of content: 24 levels in each mini-game — 48 exciting challenges in total.

  • The further you go, the hotter it gets: new outfits become more revealing with each step.

  • Gallery: view all unlocked images anytime.

  • Achievements: earn rewards for milestones and win streaks.

  • 3 difficulty modes: Easy / Normal / Hard — choose what feels right.

Hentai Furry Pig is an adult puzzle game that blends logic, attention, and a seductive vibe. Solve puzzles, beat mini-games, and unlock new explicit looks of a hot biker girl who lives for speed and thrill.

data.short_description: Hentai Furry Pig is a puzzle game for those who love logic and a hot atmosphere. Two mini-games in each level: memory matching and a jigsaw puzzle. Unlock explicit biker-girl illustrations, earn achievements, and view unlocked content in the gallery.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
